articles.author: Al Jazeera
articles.title: Australia pledges action on H5N1 after bird flu case confirmed - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Australia confirmed its first mainland H5N1 bird flu case in a seabird near Esperance, WA.
articles.content: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese says Australia will do whatever we can to curb H5N1 bird flu after the first mainland case was confirmed in a seabird, which means the virus has now spread to every co… [+993 chars]
